finding: 28 moved files (module-system/events/module/stores/store-kit/overrides/sync/api-client core+sse-types) have byte-preserved bodies; only @/ import specifiers rewritten framework-relative (T-1). Runtime logic untouched. The one value-level edit — encodeURIComponent(String(value)) (T-7) — is runtime-identical since encodeURIComponent ToStrings its arg.

The ApiClient runtime crosses the boundary generically: callAsync is <TResponse>(url: string, params: any) (body identical); createApiClient<TClient>(endpoints) is the type-erased factory. The per-app types.ts (ApiEndpoints/ApiEndpointParameters/ApiEndpointResponses) is bound ONLY in ziee's thin api-client/index.ts via `createApiClient<ApiClientType>(ApiEndpoints)`. The framework names no generated type. ziee re-derives its exact per-endpoint typing (ui tsc=0).

Five augmentable interfaces exposed at stable subpaths: RegisteredStores→@ziee/framework/stores, AppEvents→@ziee/framework/events (barrel), Slots→@ziee/framework/module-system/types, CreateModuleOptions→@ziee/framework/module, UIOverrides→@ziee/framework/overrides. All 74 `@/core/*` + 8 relative `../../core/stores` declare-module specifiers rewritten to these; ziee Stores.Auth/App/… resolve (proven: ui tsc=0). SlotKey conditional + `as never` emit let the framework compile with all five EMPTY.

Grep of sdk/packages/framework/src for `from '@/`, `import('@/`, @/modules, @/api-client/types, useAuthStore, Stores.Auth → zero real hits. The framework names no app store/module/generated type. The identity/generated-type-coupled subset (permissions, sync/types, components) is deliberately kept app-side (T-5).

getBaseURL.ts + getBaseURL.desktop.ts stay app-side (desktop-overridable via the @/-scoped localOverridePlugin). The framework transport gets the base URL via setBaseUrlResolver (default window.location.origin); ziee's thin api-client/index.ts registers setBaseUrlResolver(getBaseUrl) at boot so the desktop Tauri-port override is preserved. Same injection pattern as the pre-existing setUnauthorizedHandler / initSync(authStore).

`cd sdk/packages/framework && npx tsc --noEmit` = exit 0 with all augmentable interfaces empty — the executable proof the boundary is app-agnostic. env.d.ts supplies the import.meta.env.DEV surface (no Vite dep); node/react/react-dom types via tsconfig `types`.

The public consumer surface is preserved: `import { ApiClient } from '@/api-client'` (133 sites) unchanged — ziee's thin index.ts still exports the concrete-typed ApiClient + getAuthToken. `import { createModule, Stores } from '@ziee/framework'` (was '@/core') — same names, same shapes. sse-types/callAsync had no external ziee callers (only the factory).

Targeted, quote-anchored perl rewrites (module-system before module; store-kit before stores; sync/connection before sync'; NOT touching @/core/permissions|components|sync/types) applied to 1018 files. Residual-@/core grep shows only the 3 intended stays (permissions, components). biome lint:guardrails (noRestrictedImports) = exit 0 over 951 files.

The transport's security-relevant behavior is byte-preserved: AUTH_REFRESH_EXEMPT + COOKIE_MODE_ENDPOINTS sets, the isTauri()-gated X-Refresh-Cookie header, the X-Sync-Connection-Id self-echo stamp, the single-retry silent 401-refresh via the injected onUnauthorized, and the auth Bearer header logic are unchanged. Base-URL DI defaults to same-origin (no open redirect); no new network sink introduced.

package.json exports (. + ./api-client + ./*) for runtime bundlers + consumer-side tsconfig paths (incl. an explicit ./api-client entry) for tsc — mirrors the F1 @ziee/kit dual-resolution. npm install wires node_modules/@ziee/framework -> sdk/packages/framework symlink. deps: react/react-dom peers, zustand@5+immer@11.

The 4 covering unit specs moved with their source (stores.test.ts, store-kit.test.ts, overrides/registry.test.ts, overrides/seam.test.ts) and type-check green under the framework's tsc (allowImportingTsExtensions + node types). No behavioral assertion edited (E4). node-test RUNTIME rewiring is deferred (gate is tsc-clean) — noted in TESTS-MOVED/BOUNDARY.

Generated api-client/types.ts (ui + desktop) is byte-identical to .extraction/baseline/types.{ui,desktop}.ts and unmodified in the changeset — F2 touches no route/type/schema, so the master equivalence invariant holds without needing an openapi regen.

sync/types.ts (stays app-side) augments '@ziee/framework/events' with the app's `sync:${SyncEntity}` map derived from the generated SyncEntity union — the app half of the generated-types interface. Its `BaseEvent` import is repointed to @ziee/framework/events; the augmentation resolves (ui tsc=0), so stores' `on('sync:project', …)` typing survives.

ui/src/index.ts (the @ziee/ui-core library barrel consumed by desktop) had its core re-exports repointed (export * from '@ziee/framework'; createModule from '@ziee/framework/module'; AppModule from '@ziee/framework/module-system/types'). desktop/ui tsc=0 confirms the @ziee/ui-core surface is intact.
